text:
Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: 0 = Not substance use diagnosis (SUD) claim 
1 = SUD claim 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is derived in the TAF using ICD-9 codes 303–305 and ICD-10 codes F10–F19 to identify 
substance use-related claims.
